title: RedstoneHelper
description: A Simple Helper on Redstone Creating.
body:
This mod has added a "magnifier" and a related game rule to check some block states.

The following are all supported blocks: Redstone, Cauldron, Amethyst, Pistons, Copper Blocks, Infested Blocks, Chiseled Bookshelf, Composter, Leaves, Beehive, Crops, Shrieker, TNT

In addition, a simple permission system combined with the /rs command and 9 additional storage slots (open by pressing the R key) will bring convenience to Redstone's creation.
